# Slice Template

## Goal

State the bounded behavior or artifact outcome for this slice.

## Scope

List the implementation and evidence work included in this slice.

## Out Of Scope

List related work explicitly deferred from this slice.

## Acceptance Criteria

Record verifiable criteria that must pass before the slice can land.

## Test Plan

Describe RED tests, focused verification, and any accepted bootstrap gaps.

## CLEAN_CODE.md Read Evidence

Record the date Codex PM read `CLEAN_CODE.md` and how the spec supports clean-code verification.

## Stage-Rubric Checklist

Record applicable `docs/verification/STAGE_RUBRICS.md` stages and verdicts.

## Bootstrap Gaps

List unavailable final Bandit gates and replacement manual evidence.

## Expected Files

List expected production, test, and evidence files for this slice.

## First Implementation Order

Record the smallest order that preserves TDD and source-of-truth boundaries.

## Smell Triggers

List policy smells that would block, narrow, or escalate this slice.

## Required Evidence

List evidence files that must exist before review or landing.

## Operator Input Status

State whether product direction, UAT, policy, business tradeoff, cost/risk override, or ambiguous scope input is required.
